allowed_claim: In a controlled finite benchmark, a teacher-trained NumPy MLP probe head can transfer Suite C decision-layer inquiry: it preserves fresh stress information, regulates probe action, recovers attribution, and reopens after a second shift while stale, wrong, suppressed, and random-budget controls fail.

baselines.name: p22_learned_current_replay
baselines.result: self-silences after shift; affected post-shift density is 0.026 and final MAE is 1.281

baselines.name: teacher_burst_then_refractory
baselines.result: teacher reference uses 22.9 probes and final MAE 0.110

baselines.name: scheduled_null_anchor
baselines.result: high-cost positive control; 144.0 probes and final MAE 0.046

baselines.name: oracle_source
baselines.result: semantic high-cost reference; 67.8 probes and final MAE 0.049

baselines.name: wrong_signal_head
baselines.result: wrong-source learned-policy control; selectivity 0.000 and final MAE 0.853

baselines.name: signal_suppression_head
baselines.result: false-calm learned-policy control; no-false-calm rate 0.000 and final MAE 0.554

baselines.name: matched_random_learned_budget
baselines.result: equal-budget random inquiry control matched to learned_probe_head; recovery rate 0.000 and selectivity 0.969

benchmark.charter: Evaluate whether finite agents succeed for the right causal reasons by requiring behavior plus suite-specific structure and anti-cheat gates.
benchmark.name: Causally Grounded Finite Agents Benchmark

gates.name: silence_replication
gates.threshold: P22 baseline remains nearly silent after shift

gates.name: reengagement
gates.threshold: learned head affected post-shift density >= 0.5x pre-shift and >= 2x unaffected buckets

gates.name: recovery
gates.threshold: learned head final affected-component MAE <= 0.12 in most seeds

gates.name: no_false_calm
gates.threshold: learned head quieting pairs with recovery while signal suppression fails

gates.name: cost_aware_inquiry
gates.threshold: learned head uses fewer probes than scheduled/oracle controls at recovery threshold and beats matched-random selectivity

gates.name: second_shift_reopenability
gates.threshold: affected-bucket probes rise again after a second shift

gates.name: learned_signal_controls
gates.threshold: stale-signal, wrong-signal, and signal-suppression controls fail

minimum_pass_rule.notes: Suite C learned probe transfer passed: the learned head re-engages, recovers, avoids false calm, beats matched-random inquiry, and fails stale/wrong/suppressed signal controls.

non_claims: Not an open-agent or long-horizon tool result.
Not a human or biological habituation result.

run.command: doppler --scope /Users/jawaun/superoptimizers run -- uvx --python 3.12 --from modal modal run experiments/world_responds/modal_suite_c_neural_transfer.py --base-seed 20260706 --train-seeds 16 --calibration-seeds 6 --eval-seeds 8 --budget-usd 75 --out artifacts/world_responds/suite_c_neural_transfer_payload.json
